subcodes.first_line: Thy petition was adorned, in the Most Great Prison, with the lights of the countenance of the Ancient Lord, and from it arose the praise and glorification of the Lord of Names [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: عریضه ات در سجن اعظم بانوار وجه مالک قدم مزین شد و مدح و ثنای مالک اسما از آن
subcodes.subjects: @transience; worthlessness of the physical world, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @suffering and imprisonment, @wisdom [hikmat]
